## Description
- What is the problem this solves?
- How have you implemented the solution?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist for Reviewers
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guide.
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (Rust/Python PEP8).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published.
- [ ] The `paper.md` (JOSS submission) has been updated if relevant. (relevant when MOSAIC is submitted)

## Validation (Scientific Rigor)
- [ ] I have verified that output values remain consistent with previous versions.
- [ ] I have attached sample output/plots comparing new vs. old results.
- [ ] If this involves a new metric, I have documented the mathematical reference.
